subcodes.first_line: Thou didst ask concerning the spirit after its ascension, whether it is conscious of the physical worlds and that which hath come upon it, or not [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سؤال از روح بعد از صعود نموده بوديد که آيا روح بعوالم جسمانی و آنچه بر او وارد شده منتبه است يا نه
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @suffering and imprisonment, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation
